recommendations.title: Happy Gilmore 2
recommendations.overview: Happy Gilmore isn't done with golf — not by a long shot. Since his retirement after his first Tour Championship win, Gilmore returns to finance his daughter's ballet classes.

recommendations.title: Your Fault

recommendations.title: Happiness
recommendations.overview: The story of a rodent's unrelenting quest for happiness and fulfillment.

recommendations.title: Tin Cup
recommendations.overview: A washed up golf pro working at a driving range tries to qualify for the US Open in order to win the heart of his succesful rival's girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Summer of '92
recommendations.overview: The 1992 Danish football team competes for the European Championship.

recommendations.title: 7 Kilos in 7 Days
recommendations.overview: Two not very clever young doctors open a fitness center and promise to let people lose seven kilos in seven days. When the enterprise fails they open a gourmet restaurant.

recommendations.title: Maudie
recommendations.overview: Canadian folk artist Maud Lewis falls in love with a fishmonger while working for him as a live-in housekeeper.
